app.title: Raccoon — Developer Toolbox
home.searchPlaceholder: Type a tool name or keyword...
tool.searchPlaceholder: Type a tool name or keyword...
common.pasteToSeeResult: Paste your input above to see the result.
json.name: JSON Formatter
json.description: Format, minify, and validate JSON data
json.explanation: Formats compressed or minified JSON into a readable, indented structure. Also validates JSON syntax and highlights errors with the exact position.
json.feature1: Toggle between Format and Minify modes
json.feature2: Instant output as you type or paste
json.feature3: Copy formatted result with one click
timestamp.name: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.description: Convert between Unix, ISO 8601, RFC 2822, and relative time
timestamp.placeholder: Paste a timestamp, date string, or Unix epoch...
timestamp.pasteToSee: Paste a timestamp to see all formats.
timestamp.explanation: Converts between Unix epoch, ISO 8601, RFC 2822, and relative time formats. Shows all formats simultaneously for any input.
timestamp.feature2: Supports ISO 8601 and most date string formats
timestamp.feature3: Click "Now" to get the current timestamp
timestamp.error.outOfRange: Date is outside the representable range (year 100–9999).
timestamp.error.outOfRangeShort: Date is outside the representable range.
timestamp.error.unrecognized: Couldn't parse this as a timestamp. Try Unix epoch (e.g., 1700000000), ISO 8601, or a date string.
base64.name: Base64 Encoder
base64.encodeEmpty: Type text to see the Base64 encoded output.
base64.decodeEmpty: Paste Base64 to see the decoded text.
base64.explanation: Encodes text to Base64 or decodes Base64 strings back to text. Handles Unicode characters including Chinese and emoji.
base64.feature1: Toggle between Encode and Decode modes
base64.error.invalid: Invalid Base64: characters outside the Base64 alphabet found
url.name: URL Encoder
url.description: Encode or decode URL components and query strings
url.encodePlaceholder: Type text or URL to encode...
url.encodeEmpty: Type text to see the URL-encoded output.
url.decodeEmpty: Paste URL-encoded text to see the decoded result.
url.explanation: Encodes or decodes URL components. Converts special characters to percent-encoded format and back.
url.feature1: Toggle between Encode and Decode modes
url.feature3: Useful for query strings and URL parameters
url.error.invalidWithChar: Invalid URL encoding: '{char}' is not a valid percent-encoded sequence.
url.error.invalidGeneric: Invalid URL encoding: malformed percent-encoded sequence.
